creator: iwasaki@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
FAQ.sgml was updated on 31, March because of changing certain company's name from X Inside to Xi Graphics, but FAQ.sgml still contains some `X Inside'. Fix:

Be sure to specify that you want the FreeBSD version of Motif when ordering! Versions for BSDI and Linux are also sold by - X Inside.

+ Xi Graphics.

Are there any commercial high-performance X servers?

- Yes, + Yes, sells their Accelerated-X product for FreeBSD and other Intel based systems. @@ -1602,12 +1602,12 @@ + + --Jb8CPKZwVpanSb0Neft2o7cnEuxfnE1tXT9y4ImihIDtQv34 Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff" Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff" --- /usr/src/share/doc/FAQ/FAQ.sgml Thu Apr 10 21:20:54 1997 +++ FAQ.sgml Fri Apr 18 22:27:36 1997 @@ -1581,12 +1581,12 @@ How-To-Repeat: lynx /usr/share/doc/FAQ/FAQ.html
